title: Release / Compatibility / Human Gate UX Governance
intent: Add release policy, compatibility policy, and lightweight human gate UX improvements without creating a separate large decision UX state machine.
scope_delta: support partial approval and blocking/non-blocking decision grouping
non_goals: no full release workflow for docs-lite and process-lite changes

blocks: quant-lab public API, CLI, package identity, and legacy alias release decisions

quant_lab_relevance: Needed for quant-lab product name, import package, CLI name, legacy alias, migration note, and compatibility decision checks.
